title: Ranks+
description: Enhance your Minecraft Java Edition server with the Ranks+ resource pack. This free download adds a collection of 560 rank badges in 16 different colors and 34 unique titles. Easy to install and featuring a simplistic, vanilla-like style, it's the perfect
body:
# About
This is a resource pack you can add to your server, which contains 560 rank badges in 16 different colors and 34 titles.

# Installation
Download the latest .zip from this page.

Move the .zip into your Minecraft resourcepacks/ folder.

In Minecraft, go to Options → Resource Packs and enable ranks+.

# All the badges
The whole list can be [found here](https://ranks.tlvr.dev)
<details>
